privileged_info_summary: The task uses completely synthetic data: 32 rows (8 weeks × 4 retailers) of dishwasher price tracking for Home Depot, Lowes, Best Buy, and Costco. The total cost formula is (Base_Price * 1.07) + Delivery_Fee - Rebate, where 7% represents the tax rate. Total costs range from $858.43 (Home Depot Week 8) to $1,051.92 (Lowes Week 3). Historical price minimums per retailer are: Home Depot $858.43 (Week 8), Lowes $934.12 (Week 8), Best Buy $915.53 (Week 8), and Costco $936.32 (Week 5). In Week 8 (the current period), Home Depot offers the best deal at $858.43. Across all 8 weeks, Costco had the lowest price in 4 weeks, Home Depot in 2 weeks, and Best Buy and Lowes each in 1 week.
